meaning: adj.里海的(世界最大的咸水湖)
examples: Peter the Great expands territory beyond the Euro mountains along the Caspian Sea at the expense of the Turks.
The Caspian sea is one of the smallest sea in the world.
Russia is the only serious naval power in the Caspian.
The question is how open-minded we can be when Caspian caviar has cornered the market on fish-egg mystique.
Someone had assumed that Caspian Point is in Cardiff Central and not Cardiff South and Penarth.
